calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-03-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of an Adult and of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lori Cheshire.
Petitioners: Azia Anna Yenne, present in pro per and as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Michael Cash Yenne Bolos.
Minor's father: Michael B. Bolos, present as Guardian ad litem for the Minor.
Petitioners were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Azia Anna Yenne Bolos, and grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Cash Michael Yenne Bolos.
Decree signed in open court.
